meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

boundaries: Dutch Bros (BROS) 营收以30%复合年增长率（CAGR）增长。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立。

tumen_quota.name: 基础数据收集
tumen_quota.description: 收集Dutch Bros (BROS) 2024年末的年度营收 (Revenue) 和毛利率 (Gross Margin) 数据。
tumen_quota.target: 获取2024年BROS的年度营收和毛利率数值。

tumen_quota.name: 2026年营收预测
tumen_quota.description: 基于2024年营收和30%的复合年增长率 (CAGR)，计算并确定2026年的预测营收。
tumen_quota.target: 计算出2026年BROS的预测营收数值。

tumen_quota.name: 2026年毛利率预测
tumen_quota.description: 基于2024年毛利率和500个基点 (5%) 的压缩，计算并确定2026年的预测毛利率。
tumen_quota.target: 计算出2026年BROS的预测毛利率百分比。

tumen_quota.name: 2026年毛利润计算
tumen_quota.description: 结合预测的2026年营收和2026年毛利率，计算最终的2026年毛利润。
tumen_quota.target: 得出2026年BROS的最终毛利润数值。

updates.decomposition_rule: 逐级分解口径为1:10。每个万户级配额可进一步分解为最多10个千户级子任务，每个千户级子任务可分解为最多10个百户级子任务，以此类推，直至十户级。分解应聚焦于达成该层级目标的具体行动、所需信息或计算步骤，确保任务粒度逐级细化。
updates.reporting_cycle: 万户级配额完成后，需提交该阶段的关键数据或计算结果。总任务（即所有万户级配额）完成后，需提交2026年毛利润的最终计算结果，包括所有中间数据和详细计算过程。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

event.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立。

jaghun_allocations.description: Identify 2024 Dutch Bros (BROS) Year-End Financial Reports.
Extract 2024 BROS Year-End Total Revenue.
Extract 2024 BROS Year-End Gross Profit.
Calculate 2024 BROS Year-End Gross Margin.
Project 2025 BROS Revenue based on 30% CAGR.
Project 2026 BROS Revenue based on 30% CAGR.
Calculate 2026 Projected Gross Margin with 500 basis points compression.
Calculate 2026 Projected Gross Profit.
Review and Validate all Intermediate Calculations.
Prepare Final 2026 Gross Profit Projection Report.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

arban_allocations.title: Research 2024 Dutch Bros (BROS) Annual Revenue
arban_allocations.description: Identify and retrieve the annual revenue for Dutch Bros (BROS) for the fiscal year 2024 from reliable financial sources.
arban_allocations.input: Company ticker: BROS, Fiscal year: 2024, Metric: Annual Revenue

arban_allocations.title: Research 2024 Dutch Bros (BROS) Gross Margin
arban_allocations.description: Identify and retrieve the gross margin percentage for Dutch Bros (BROS) for the fiscal year 2024 from reliable financial sources.
arban_allocations.input: Company ticker: BROS, Fiscal year: 2024, Metric: Gross Margin

arban_allocations.title: Calculate 2025 Projected Revenue
arban_allocations.description: Calculate the projected revenue for 2025 based on the 2024 annual revenue and a 30% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR).
arban_allocations.input: 2024 Annual Revenue, Revenue CAGR: 30%

arban_allocations.title: Calculate 2026 Projected Revenue
arban_allocations.description: Calculate the projected revenue for 2026 based on the 2025 projected revenue and a 30% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR).
arban_allocations.input: 2025 Projected Revenue, Revenue CAGR: 30%

arban_allocations.title: Calculate 2026 Projected Gross Margin
arban_allocations.description: Calculate the projected gross margin for 2026 based on the 2024 gross margin and a compression of 500 basis points.
arban_allocations.input: 2024 Gross Margin, Gross Margin Compression: 500 basis points (5%)

arban_allocations.title: Initial Calculation of 2026 Gross Profit
arban_allocations.description: Perform the initial calculation of Dutch Bros' gross profit for 2026 using the 2026 projected revenue and 2026 projected gross margin.
arban_allocations.input: 2026 Projected Revenue, 2026 Projected Gross Margin

arban_allocations.title: Validate 2024 Financial Data Sources
arban_allocations.description: Verify the reliability and accuracy of the sources used to obtain 2024 annual revenue and gross margin data.
arban_allocations.input: Sources for 2024 Annual Revenue and Gross Margin

arban_allocations.title: Review Revenue Growth Assumption Impact
arban_allocations.description: Conduct a brief analysis on how variations in the 30% CAGR assumption might impact the projected 2026 revenue.
arban_allocations.input: Revenue CAGR assumption: 30%
arban_allocations.output: Brief analysis report on revenue growth sensitivity

arban_allocations.title: Review Gross Margin Compression Assumption Impact
arban_allocations.description: Conduct a brief analysis on how variations in the 500 basis points gross margin compression assumption might impact the projected 2026 gross margin.
arban_allocations.input: Gross Margin Compression assumption: 500 basis points
arban_allocations.output: Brief analysis report on gross margin compression sensitivity

arban_allocations.title: Final Aggregation and Reporting of 2026 Gross Profit
arban_allocations.description: Aggregate all calculated components and review validation/sensitivity analyses to produce the final reported 2026 Gross Profit for Dutch Bros.
arban_allocations.input: Initial 2026 Gross Profit, Validation results, Sensitivity analyses
arban_allocations.output: Final 2026 Gross Profit figure and summary report

readiness.status: All 10 arban-level tasks have been allocated and are ready for execution.

updates.contingency: No contingency plan required at this allocation stage as no shortfalls or failures have occurred.

agent_trace.summary: [执行冲突] 无法执行财务预测任务。十户级执行节点职责为末端人员动员与集结回报，与荷兰兄弟（BROS）2026年毛利润预测任务类型严重不符。本阶段无法进行户级动员以完成此财务计算任务。
agent_trace.raw_tail:
500 basis points from year-end 2024 levels. What is BROS gross profit in 2026?"

There is a clear conflict between my designated role/stage objective (household mobilization) and the actual user task (financial projection). This aligns with `Rule 54: 角色职责冲突处理` and `Insight 1: Gated Pipeline误用陷阱与规避`. My core responsibilities are related to "户级动员执行", "到位核验", and "缺口原因分析", not financial calculations.

According to `Rule 54`, I should "immediately report `[执行冲突]` and stop task execution". However, the `Topology Contract` specifies that `allowed_decisions` is `["next"]`, meaning I must return `next`.

To resolve this, I will:
1.  Acknowledge the conflict in the `summary`.
2.  Explain that the user task (financial projection) cannot be performed by this stage due to a mismatch in responsibilities.
3.  Report this inability using the `arban_level_execute`'s reporting structure (e.g., `updates.household_mobilization`, `updates.actual_ready`, `updates.gap_and_reason`), framing it as a "mobilization failure" for the given task.
4.  Set `decision` to `"next"` as required.

This approach allows me to adhere to the `Topology Contract` and `allowed_decisions` while explicitly communicating the `Rule 54` violation and the inability to execute the user's actual task within my current role.

The `summary` will start with `[执行冲突]`.
`updates.household_mobilization` will state the inability to mobilize for this task.
`updates.actual_ready` will be 0.
`updates.gap_and_reason` will explain the fundamental mismatch between the task and the stage's responsibilities.<summary>报告执行冲突：十户级执行节点无法执行财务预测任务，与动员职责不符。</summary>
